prerequisites: An active Pivotal Tracker login with access to the projects you want to sync.
An API token generated from your Pivotal Tracker profile page (this maps to the connector's required api_token field).
Network access from where pm runs to the Pivotal Tracker REST API at https://www.pivotaltracker.com/services/v5.

authMethods.name: API token (X-TrackerToken header)
authMethods.summary: Pivotal Tracker uses single-factor token authentication. Each login has a unique API token that authenticates requests, sent in the X-TrackerToken HTTP header. Provide this value as the connector's api_token field.

setupSteps.title: Locate your API token
setupSteps.body: Log in to Pivotal Tracker and open your Profile page. Your personal API token is shown there; it serves as single-factor authentication for all REST API requests made on your behalf. Copy the token value.

setupSteps.title: Verify the token works
setupSteps.body: Confirm the token authenticates against the API. For example: export TOKEN='your token'; curl -X GET -H "X-TrackerToken: $TOKEN" "https://www.pivotaltracker.com/services/v5/me". A 200 response returns your profile and the projects you can access.

setupSteps.title: Configure the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the required api_token config field to the token value you copied. pm passes it in the X-TrackerToken header on each request to the Pivotal Tracker REST API (v5).

sources.title: Pivotal Tracker REST API v5 (official docs, archived) - authentication and X-TrackerToken
Pivotal Tracker API token (official help article, archived)
